subject: feat(pwa): add visibility-based update checks, 30s suppression, and install singleton
body:
usePWAUpdate: Rewrite as module-level singleton with pub/sub. Adds
visibilitychange listener to check for SW updates when tab regains focus,
30-second sessionStorage suppression after user clicks Update (prevents
false re-detection during SW lifecycle settle), controllerchange reload
guard (only reloads if user explicitly triggered update), and manual
checkForUpdate() with checking state for future menu integration.

usePWAInstall: Lift canInstall and showManualInstructions from per-instance
React state to module-level variables with pub/sub notification. All hook
consumers now share state — when one instance sets canInstall=false after
install, all others update immediately.

Tags: pwa, hooks, state
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: minor
